'''Vletho''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] spacer, and a debtor of [[Vilmarh Grahrk]]. He did not speak [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]]. Vletho made several unsuccessful attempts at ending Grahrk's life at the [[Cluster]] [[Cantina/Legends|Cantina]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. He frequently drank there with [[Gar Gastinin]], [[Keluda]], a [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]], and a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]].

{{Char-stub}}
